subcodes.first_line: O thou sagacious soul! I have intoned verses of thanksgiving unto God for having aided thee with the hosts of victory from on high [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الرجل الرشید انی رتلت ایات شکرک لله بما ایدک بجنود النصر من الملا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
